mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS id, order_id AS orderId, customer_id AS customerId, order_status AS orderStatus, order_purchase_timestamp AS orderPurchaseTimestamp, '电子产品' AS productCategory, 'credit_card' AS paymentType, 'Sao Paulo' AS customerCity FROM olist_orders

SELECT o.order_id AS id, o.order_id AS orderId, o.customer_id AS customerId, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.order_purchase_timestamp AS orderPurchaseTimestamp, p.product_category_name AS productCategory, 'credit_card' AS paymentType, c.customer_city AS customerCity, oi.price AS amount, oi.quantity AS quantity, p.product_category_name AS category FROM olist_orders o LEFT JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id ORDER BY o.order_purchase_timestamp DESC LIMIT #{param1}, #{param2}

SELECT p.product_category_name AS productCategory, COUNT(*) AS count FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name
SELECT c.customer_city AS userCity, COUNT(*) AS count FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_city
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_purchase_timestamp, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total FROM olist_orders GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity) FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_purchase_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM olist_orders GROUP BY date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) FROM olist_orders o LEFT JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
AND (o.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.customer_city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) FROM olist_orders o LEFT JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
AND (o.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.customer_city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) FROM olist_orders o LEFT JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN olist_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
AND (o.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.customer_city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
